name: Fly.io

naming.description: Standard POSIX. FLY_ prefix vars are injected by the platform at runtime.

limits.notes: No documented hard limits. Secrets are encrypted at rest and injected as env vars. Use 'fly secrets set' to manage.

notes: Fly secrets are encrypted and only available at runtime. They persist across deployments. Use fly.toml [env] for non-sensitive config.
